printed.name: Side Over
printed.setup: Lying sideways to Ladder Barrel, pelvis resting on barrel, trunk on diagonal line, bottom leg straight, foot placed on lower rung of ladder, top hip externally rotated, top leg bent, foot dorsiflexed, heel placed on second rung from top, foot under top rung, hands behind head

movement.exhale: Straighten and lift trunk, return to start position

cues: Start and end with trunk and leg on diagonal line
Maintain pressure on heel and avoid pulling with top foot → ? under ladder
Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Imagine moving between two panes of glass
